tagline: Sync your soul with the night in this intimate Pop House jou
liner: Step into 'In Love With The Party,' a mid-tempo sanctuary where warmth and rhythm collide. This F# major track blends lush synth pads with soft guitar hums to create an atmosphere of pure euphoria, perfect for those seeking nighttime escapism. At its heart lies the enduring connection between two souls syncing their hearts until dawn. As the energy dips gracefully for vocal intimacy before rising again, you'll feel the 808 bassline driving a restrained groove that celebrates life amidst bustling crowds. Every moment is designed to make you fall deeper into the late-night haze, proving that true love can be found even when the drums fade out and only the vinyl crackle remains.
worldCaption: A luminous club scene where warm synth pads glow against low lights, capturing an intimate dance floor connection that lingers long after th

bios.lead: Sings smooth secrets like a hummed melody saved for later.
bios.back: Adds layered depth to every breathy whisper and soaring note.
bios.drums: Pulses with an eighties heartbeat that keeps spirits dancing right.
bios.bass: Delivers driving yet restrained warmth under the dancefloor floorboards.
bios.synth: Weaves lush pads around vocals like a comforting, glowing blanket.
bios.other: Sprinkles textures to make every late-night moment feel golden.
